narrative:
Stonelick Township A (precinct in Clermont County) has 933 registered voters, with 47.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.8 percentage points.
